hooks.command: if [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" = "true" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/scripts/setup-ccweb.sh"; else direnv export bash > "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; fi
if [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" = "true" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/scripts/setup-ccweb.sh"; else direnv export bash > "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) oxfmt --write "$f" && oxlint --fix "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
